event_invitees_event_email_unique.name: event_invitees_event_email_unique
event_invitees_event_email_unique.where: "event_invitees"."email" IS NOT NULL AND "event_invitees"."revoked_at" IS NULL

event_invitees_event_phone_unique.name: event_invitees_event_phone_unique
event_invitees_event_phone_unique.where: "event_invitees"."phone" IS NOT NULL AND "event_invitees"."revoked_at" IS NULL

event_invitees_identity_ck.name: event_invitees_identity_ck
event_invitees_identity_ck.value: "event_invitees"."person_id" IS NOT NULL OR "event_invitees"."email" IS NOT NULL OR "event_invitees"."phone" IS NOT NULL

people_contact_ck.name: people_contact_ck
people_contact_ck.value: "people"."email" IS NOT NULL OR "people"."phone" IS NOT NULL
